inputs.label: Calculation Mode
inputs.businessContext: 1: Unit Conversion (mg/dL <-> mmol/L), 2: HbA1c to eAG (mg/dL), 3: eAG (mg/dL) to HbA1c

businessContext_i18n.en: 1: Unit Conversion (mg/dL <-> mmol/L), 2: HbA1c to eAG (mg/dL), 3: eAG (mg/dL) to HbA1c
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1: Birim Dönüşümü (mg/dL <-> mmol/L), 2: HbA1c'den eAG'ye (mg/dL), 3: eAG'den (mg/dL) HbA1c'ye
businessContext_i18n.de: 1: Einheitenumrechnung (mg/dL <-> mmol/L), 2: HbA1c zu eAG (mg/dL), 3: eAG (mg/dL) zu HbA1c
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 : Conversion d'unité (mg/dL <-> mmol/L), 2 : HbA1c vers eAG (mg/dL), 3 : eAG (mg/dL) vers HbA1c
businessContext_i18n.es: 1: Conversión de unidades (mg/dL <-> mmol/L), 2: HbA1c a eAG (mg/dL), 3: eAG (mg/dL) a HbA1c
businessContext_i18n.ar: 1: تحويل الوحدات (ملغم/ديسيلتر <-> مليمول/لتر)، 2: HbA1c إلى eAG (ملغم/ديسيلتر)، 3: eAG (ملغم/ديسيلتر) إلى HbA1c

inputs.label: Input Value
inputs.businessContext: The blood glucose value to convert or calculate from; unit depends on mode and unitFrom

businessContext_i18n.en: The blood glucose value to convert or calculate from; unit depends on mode and unitFrom
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüştürülecek veya hesaplanacak kan glukoz değeri; birim, mod ve unitFrom'a bağlıdır
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Blutzuckerwert, der umgerechnet oder berechnet werden soll; Einheit hängt von Modus und unitFrom ab
businessContext_i18n.fr: La valeur de glycémie à convertir ou à calculer ; l'unité dépend du mode et de unitFrom
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor de glucosa en sangre a convertir o calcular; la unidad depende del modo y unitFrom
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة الجلوكوز في الدم المراد تحويلها أو الحساب منها؛ تعتمد الوحدة على الوضع ووحدة الإدخال

inputs.label: Input Unit
inputs.businessContext: 1 for mg/dL, 2 for mmol/L (used in mode 1; in other modes, assume input units accordingly)

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 for mg/dL, 2 for mmol/L (used in mode 1; in other modes, assume input units accordingly)
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 mg/dL, 2 mmol/L (mod 1'de kullanılır; diğer modlarda giriş birimi buna göre varsayılır)
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 für mg/dL, 2 für mmol/L (verwendet in Modus 1; in anderen Modi entsprechend Eingabeeinheiten)
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 pour mg/dL, 2 pour mmol/L (utilisé en mode 1 ; dans les autres modes, supposer les unités d'entrée appropriées)
businessContext_i18n.es: 1 para mg/dL, 2 para mmol/L (usado en modo 1; en otros modos, asumir unidades de entrada según corresponda)
businessContext_i18n.ar: 1 لملغم/ديسيلتر، 2 لمليمول/لتر (يستخدم في الوضع 1؛ في الأوضاع الأخرى، افترض وحدات الإدخال وفقًا لذلك)

inputs.label: Target Unit
inputs.businessContext: 1 for mg/dL, 2 for mmol/L (used in mode 1)

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 for mg/dL, 2 for mmol/L (used in mode 1)
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 für mg/dL, 2 für mmol/L (verwendet in Modus 1)
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 pour mg/dL, 2 pour mmol/L (utilisé en mode 1)
businessContext_i18n.es: 1 para mg/dL, 2 para mmol/L (usado en modo 1)

inputs.label: Fasting State
inputs.businessContext: 1 if fasting, 0 if non-fasting (for reference only, does not affect calculation)

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 if fasting, 0 if non-fasting (for reference only, does not affect calculation)
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 aç, 0 tok (yalnızca referans amaçlıdır, hesaplamayı etkilemez)
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 wenn nüchtern, 0 wenn nicht nüchtern (nur als Referenz, beeinflusst Berechnung nicht)
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 si à jeun, 0 si non à jeun (pour référence uniquement, n'affecte pas le calcul)
businessContext_i18n.es: 1 si está en ayunas, 0 si no está en ayunas (solo como referencia, no afecta el cálculo)
businessContext_i18n.ar: 1 إذا كان صائمًا، 0 إذا لم يكن صائمًا (للإشارة فقط، لا يؤثر على الحساب)

breakdown: Unit conversion: mg/dL to mmol/L: divide by 18.0182; mmol/L to mg/dL: multiply by 18.0182
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
